description: HTB target definitions for Pulse integration tests.
instructions: Spawn an HTB machine, set its IP below, and run integration tests with --target <name>.

machines.name: oopsie
machines.notes: HTB retired free. Port 80 (Apache 2.4.29), SMB on 445.

machines.name: bashed
machines.notes: HTB retired free. Port 80 (Apache), phpbash shell upload.

machines.name: Vaccine
machines.notes: HTB retired free. Port 80 (Apache), phpbash shell upload.

machines.name: lame
machines.notes: HTB retired free. SMB usermap script, vsftpd 2.3.4.

machines.name: scanme
machines.notes: Nmap's public test target. Always available, port 80 (Apache), port 22 (SSH).

quick.description: Fast smoke tests — lightweight tools only
